title: What if Mari were in NGE
display_title: What if Mari were in NGE
wikitext:
[]: What if Mari were in NGE?             Quote Post by ZetaSonic » Wed Sep 07, 2016 1:46 am How differently would the TV show turn out? (Kind of a stupid question considering 3.0 + 1.0 hasn't been made yet, but it was something I've wondered about amid dishwashing...)

[]: Re: What if Mari were in NGE?             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Wed Sep 07, 2016 6:21 am I can't really imagine Mari on NGE at all. That's probably a testament to how fresh and new she feels in NTE. But if she were in NGE she would probably have a backstory as insane as Haruko Haruhara's in FLCL. I can't imagine a Kazuya Tsurumaki character having more prominence while also being integrated in a sci-fi setting without it getting on several levels of comic crazy.

[]: Re: What if Mari were in NGE?             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed Sep 07, 2016 9:23 am I've sworn up and down for years that what NGE needed was a yandere. Make Mari a yandere.

[]: Re: What if Mari were in NGE?             Quote Post by Arcadia's legacy » Wed Sep 07, 2016 9:27 am Why exactly would NGE need a Yandere?

[]: Re: What if Mari were in NGE?             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed Sep 07, 2016 9:52 am Because I love yanderes. Particularly realistic portrayals, which I'm sure NGE would have been able to pull off. Unhealthy co-dependency, separation anxiety, jealousy, obsession, and a desire to bathe in the blood of one's enemies. What's not to love? Mari's already got a bit of the bloodthirsty crazy. She just needs the soul-crushing backstory and attachment issues. Of course, this would take away from a lot of what makes Mari fresh in NTE, but if you gotta do it, might as well go all out.

[]: Re: What if Mari were in NGE?             Quote Post by Ray » Wed Sep 07, 2016 10:06 am plus the possibility of a non incestuous threesome. I'm terrible.

[]: Re: What if Mari were in NGE?             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Sep 07, 2016 4:31 pm The obvious thing is for her to take on Sarai's role in the original.

[]: Re: What if Mari were in NGE?             Quote Post by Director Black » Wed Sep 07, 2016 6:15 pm Mari would probably work as a comic relief, and a shitty one at that. Not to mention that it would just make things even more convoluted, seeing as how they'll have to add even more background to a series that was losing money with each passing episode.

[]: Re: What if Mari were in NGE?             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed Sep 07, 2016 6:59 pm Director Black wrote: Mari would probably work as a comic relief, and a shitty one at that. Not to mention that it would just make things even more convoluted, seeing as how they'll have to add even more background to a series that was losing money with each passing episode.

[]: Re: What if Mari were in NGE?             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Sep 07, 2016 7:22 pm If Mari were in NGE, she would be one of the nameless female 2-A students because, really, where else is she going to fit?

[]: Re: What if Mari were in NGE?             Quote Post by ZetaSonic » Fri Sep 09, 2016 1:46 am I guess the concept came from the one-sided fight between Asuka and the Harpies. What if a second Eva were online?

[]: Re: What if Mari were in NGE?             Quote Post by silvermoonlight » Sat Sep 10, 2016 6:44 am ZetaSonic wrote: I guess the concept came from the one-sided fight between Asuka and the Harpies. What if a second Eva were online?

[]: Re: What if Mari were in NGE?             Quote Post by Director Black » Sat Sep 10, 2016 4:48 pm Sachi wrote: Citation needed on that last bit.

[]: Re: What if Mari were in NGE?             Quote Post by Chuckman » Sat Sep 10, 2016 11:11 pm Ray wrote: plus the possibility of a non incestuous threesome. I'm terrible.

[]: Re: What if Mari were in NGE?             Quote Post by Retro Chocolate » Wed Sep 21, 2016 11:58 am Mr. Tines wrote: The obvious thing is for her to take on Sarai's role in the original.

[]: Re: What if Mari were in NGE?             Quote Post by Gargantuar » Wed Sep 21, 2016 1:50 pm Meh, Mari's character is overall pretty empty so I don't think we would need it in NGE.

[]: Re: What if Mari were in NGE?             Quote Post by StrokeMeGoat » Thu Sep 29, 2016 2:19 am Sachi wrote: Because I love yanderes. Particularly realistic portrayals, which I'm sure NGE would have been able to pull off. Unhealthy co-dependency, separation anxiety, jealousy, obsession, and a desire to bathe in the blood of one's enemies. What's not to love? Mari's already got a bit of the bloodthirsty crazy. She just needs the soul-crushing backstory and attachment issues. Of course, this would take away from a lot of what makes Mari fresh in NTE, but if you gotta do it, might as well go all out.

[]: Re: What if Mari were in NGE?             Quote Post by Sachi » Thu Sep 29, 2016 2:44 am Asuka isn't a tsundere, but she's the closest NGE incarnation. A NGE yandere wouldn't have to fit the term 100%. Not to plug my own characters, but I used to have an RP character that was intended to be an NGE!yandere, with a natural, realistic descent into madness, based somewhat on one of my past relationships (toxic parts about both of us in one person). Unfortunately, the character arc was never finished. I wouldn't apply the same arc to Mari, but I feel something to the effect of what I said could be done. Even if you disagree with whether it's actually yandere.

[]: Re: What if Mari were in NGE?             Quote Post by StrokeMeGoat » Thu Sep 29, 2016 12:15 pm Sachi wrote: Asuka isn't a tsundere, but she's the closest NGE incarnation. A NGE yandere wouldn't have to fit the term 100%. Not to plug my own characters, but I used to have an RP character that was intended to be an NGE!yandere, with a natural, realistic descent into madness, based somewhat on one of my past relationships (toxic parts about both of us in one person). Unfortunately, the character arc was never finished. I wouldn't apply the same arc to Mari, but I feel something to the effect of what I said could be done. Even if you disagree with whether it's actually yandere.

[]: Re: What if Mari were in NGE?             Quote Post by DarkBluePhoenix » Fri Oct 14, 2016 1:00 pm So, I saw this forum as I wa going through areas of the site I've never really perused before. Well, if you'd like to see how Mari would look inside the series itself, look no further than my fanfic, Neon Genesis Evangelion: Legacy . The fic goes through the origins of the adult characters, in the first arc (including Mari), the second arc retells the show with the apporiate changes for the story, and if this sounds interesting to you, may I direct you my thread here on evageeks , or my Fanfiction.net Profile . Either way, there's a lot that goes on with Mari in the mix and how she breaks up the Asuka/Shinji/Rei trio and her lasting effects on their interpersonal relationships. Now I know my take won't be everyone's take on how Mari would be if she had been in the original series, but it's my best guess, and will it be entertaining to write and hopefully for ya'll to read. In short it would be very different.
